name: Desiigner
description:
'''Sidney Royel Selby III''' (born May 3, 1997), better known by his stage name '''Desiigner''', is an American rapper and singer. He is best known for his 2015 debut single "[[Panda (song)|Panda]]", which topped the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]]. Shortly after the song gained viral status online, he signed with [[Kanye West]]'s [[GOOD Music]], an imprint of [[Def Jam Recordings]].
His 2016 follow-up single, "[[Tiimmy Turner]]", peaked at number 34 on the ''Billboard'' Hot 100. Despite this, Desiigner is frequently described as a [[one-hit wonder]].

Without releasing a debut studio album, he parted ways with both labels in 2019.
